name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_inspection_all_attributes
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_inspection_all_attributes' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Created User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Scheduled Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Created Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Start Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Timesheets` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Created User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Scheduled Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Created Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Start Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Timesheets` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Created User|Completed User|Scheduled Date|Created Date|Start Date|Completed Date|Timesheets' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_inspection_all_attributes`

data_array: Created User|Completed User|Scheduled Date|Created Date|Start Date|Completed Date|Timesheets
